tasks.name: verify_sdwan_sync
tasks.description:
[NRFU]: Verify All SD-WAN Edge Configurations Are In-Sync
------------------------------------
This job file verifies that all managed SD-WAN edge devices with an assigned system IP
have their configuration synchronized with the SD-WAN Manager using the REST API.

sections.name: VerifySDWANManagerEdgeConfigSync
sections.description:
[SDWAN-Manager] Verify All SD-WAN Edge Configurations Are In-Sync

    This test verifies that all SD-WAN edge devices with a configured system IP
    and that are managed (i.e., 'managed-by' != 'Unmanaged') have their configuration
    'In Sync'. Devices that do not have a 'configuredSystemIP' or are 'Unmanaged'
    are out of validation scope.

sections.name: setup
sections.description:
Setup method that extends the generic base class setup.

        Initializes the SDWAN Manager test environment by:
        1. Calling the parent class setup method
        2. Obtaining SDWAN Manager session data (jsessionid, xsrf_token) using
           cached auth
        3. Creating and storing an SDWAN Manager client for use in verification methods

        The session data is obtained through the SDWANManagerAuth utility which
        manages session lifecycle and prevents duplicate authentication requests
        across parallel test execution.

result.reason: Caught an exception while executing section setup

data.traceback:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/Users/oboehmer/Documents/DD/nac-test-pyats-common/src/nac_test_pyats_common/sdwan/api_test_base.py", line 89, in setup
    self.auth_data = SDWANManagerAuth.get_auth()
                     ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
  File "/Users/oboehmer/Documents/DD/nac-test-pyats-common/src/nac_test_pyats_common/sdwan/auth.py", line 209, in get_auth
    raise ValueError(
ValueError: Missing required environment variables: SDWAN_URL, SDWAN_USERNAME, SDWAN_PASSWORD

tasks.name: verify_sdwan_sync_10
tasks.description:
[NRFU]: Verify All SD-WAN Edge Configurations Are In-Sync
------------------------------------
This job file verifies that all managed SD-WAN edge devices with an assigned system IP
have their configuration synchronized with the SD-WAN Manager using the REST API.

sections.name: VerifySDWANManagerEdgeConfigSync10
sections.description:
[SDWAN-Manager] Verify All SD-WAN Edge Configurations Are In-Sync

    This test verifies that all SD-WAN edge devices with a configured system IP
    and that are managed (i.e., 'managed-by' != 'Unmanaged') have their configuration
    'In Sync'. Devices that do not have a 'configuredSystemIP' or are 'Unmanaged'
    are out of validation scope.

sections.name: setup
sections.description:
Setup method that extends the generic base class setup.

        Initializes the SDWAN Manager test environment by:
        1. Calling the parent class setup method
        2. Obtaining SDWAN Manager session data (jsessionid, xsrf_token) using
           cached auth
        3. Creating and storing an SDWAN Manager client for use in verification methods

        The session data is obtained through the SDWANManagerAuth utility which
        manages session lifecycle and prevents duplicate authentication requests
        across parallel test execution.
